channel.title: Open Source on Codehaks | Engineering-Driven CAD Solutions
channel.description: Recent content in Open Source on Codehaks | Engineering-Driven CAD Solutions

item.title: CodeHaks TotalLength
item.description: Open-source AutoCAD plugin for calculating total length of selected objects

item.title: Calculate Total Length in AutoCAD with CodeHaks TotalLength
item.description: An open-source AutoCAD plugin that calculates the total length of selected lines, polylines, and arcs in a single command.
